query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!"
            FROM memories m1
            CROSS JOIN memories m2
            WHERE m1.id < m2.id
              AND 1 - (m1.embedding <=> m2.embedding) > 0.85
              AND m1.memory_category = m2.memory_category
              AND m1.compression_level = 0
              AND m2.compression_level = 0
            LIMIT 10
